title: Doctor's Report
text:
## Doctor's Report

**Patient presentation:** Patient presents with a {adjective} {body part} ache near the {body part}.

**Vital signs:** {adjective} and slightly {adjective}.

**Treatment:** Rest, {adjective} fluids, and one small {object} taken {adverb} with meals.

**Follow-up:** Follow up if symptoms become {adjective} or if the patient begins to {verb} uncontrollably at work.

**Notes:** Patient insists this started after eating {food} at a {adjective} restaurant. Prescription signed with a {color} pen.
